description: We have saved money by having to the minute hours reported through the App. We have also improved upon ensuring staff coverage for our facility- Staff is able to communicate with each other or the Managers via the app if they are unable to fulfill their shift and thereafter find a replacement prior to the shift start. It's a great tool for any size business and a great value compared to the hardwire systems available on the market today.
author: Jay G.
pros: The ease of use of the Software makes scheduling Staff a Breeze! Receiving scheduling notifications on ones phone is awesome, as well as communicating with Staff via the App has really streamlined our scheduling confirmation process. The ability to turn rules on and off and customize parameters for punching in and out is also helping us manage our Labor more efficently
cons: Honestly, there are no Cons that I can think off

description: The staff are all really quick at responding to any queries, all of our clients and staff are finding the platform easy to use
author: Suzanne E.
pros: I find the platdform extremely easy to use and dinding staff in specific areas works really well for our business. The clock in and out system is working well and ince the staff remembered to do this daily its become a great time saver against using ild timesheets
cons: On the App staff on occasions struggle to put in their travel expenses/mileage

description: I like the platform overal. Maybe it would make things easier if we had an option when crew is booked to let everyone know that the shift is filled.
author: Nikki V.
pros: The event overview is good. Vissualy it looks great.
cons: Setting up an event takes a lot of steps. Also reviewing real time tracker and planning schedule are not great.

description: The team at Ubeya have always been very responsive and taken any recommendations we have made and looked at. The platform has developed strongly over the past few years and with the added benefit of an open API, it allows us to do lots of automations that we need
author: Graeme R.
pros: Very user-friendly, easy to use as a client and employee. Open API gives us lots of extra functionality,
cons: Timesheet functionality limited for our requirements

review_title: Ubeya is simply a fantastic CRM/Database solution
description: I have been immensely impressed with Ubeya and their support team, they go above and beyond to support my business.
author: Roy D.
pros: The setup was made simple by the excellent support team. It allows you to send messages to Clients and Candidates, and you can also use its timesheet function.
cons: As a recruitment company owner, I have suggested that Ubeya implement an option for contractors to be able to raise an invoice for the work they have completed. I am able to invoice my clients, but this valuable solution would enhance Ubeya as a CRM solution even more.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Easy to use and easy to modify when needed
author: Victoria C.
pros: Ease of use for hospitality recruitment and payroll
cons: Does not flag when employees do not upload correct files

description: We love our ubeya team and appreciate their initiative to make the software optimize.
author: Krista H.
pros: the booking process of avail checks, booked, and releasing staff. Love how customizable it is.
cons: the payroll process of exporting and inability to have formula access.

review_title: Easy to use work force management system
description: Whilst there the adjustment from our previous WFM system has been a little difficult. I have found learning how to use Ubeya very easy and the team have been so kind and patient with us. There have been some struggles with the flexibility of it as a WFM system with things such as payrates but Ubeya is definitely a step in the right direction
author: Isobel S.
pros: I like how easy it is to navigate, it is very user friendly and was easy to pick up
cons: I wish there was more flexibility to customise (payrates, job title etc)

description: Good compared to previous systems, always room to improve
author: Sam T.
pros: Usability, speed of adding bookings and candidates. Ability to work with other systems
cons: Struggle to pull reports, often length of dates can stop reports from working

description: Overall its great system for workforce management
author: Gintare P.
pros: I like how efficient and quick is to create events, assign shifts and send to staff
cons: any changes made for agency staff requires attention and double checking as it might create double booking

description: Fantastic so far - great team with lots of support
author: Rory D.
pros: Supportive team / Easy to use App / Customer Portal
cons: Easier interface for clock in on App / Age specific job roles
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Alex R.
pros: Great scheduling tool, easy to book candidates into shifts.
cons: Would be good if it could be used as a way of registering candidates too.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very easy to use and the constant updates from the Ubeya team are useful
author: Maeve H.
pros: Its so easy to get people booked in for shifts
cons: Sometimes it can be a bit glitchy and the business app is not great

description: Overall Ubeya has been great to work with.
author: Hal K.
pros: Ease of use and the time saved during planning and check in at venues.
cons: I wish there were options for the layout.

description: not bad actually, I think its good software with a few room for improvements
author: Michael F.
pros: easy to use very straight forward, also like the way we can just copy event and repost
cons: the fact we have to sing in 2x in order to get access

description: Overall ubeya is excellent tool for seamless communication with clients, candidates and colleagues- It is invaluable when working as a small team to help with data storage management and compliance. Having experienced the app as an administrator and user I would definitely recommend.
author: Josephine B.
pros: It super user friendly, even without an instruction guide you can navigate the site with ease.
cons: Small errors with the software when trying to save documents/ add expiry dates/generate reports, when managing a large number of candidates its difficult to consistently double check everything in case the errors have occurred.

description: improvements get noticed and rectified continuing to make the usability better and more simple
author: Rebecca S.
pros: The Quickness and usability of booking staff into events. The ease of communication between both user (Client(venue)/Casual Workers/Consultants) Consistency of casual workers in areas It is easier to assess/know where people have worked before and how many times
cons: Live View Page on event days slowness of the website sometimes

description: Exceptional product and experience. Value for money.
author: Thia D.
pros: The user interface was very easy to understand. Creating schedule and communication was very easy and it went smoothly.
cons: Sometimes the messages sent are not shown correctly to the person on the receiver end.

description: Happy with it, the service we get from Adi and the team is very good.
author: Liam D.
pros: The features that it offers, it has a lot of potential
cons: There are sometimes very small glitches, although are sorted very quickly by the team.

description: A good one as it makes my life very simple in terms of what i need to do
author: Paul H.
pros: The System is great and really straightfoward to use and very quick to upload shifts etc
cons: Nothing think the system is great and in my opinion a really easy system to use.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Overall a great tool to manage the great people that work within our business.
author: Daniel W.
pros: Works great being able to update the planner quickly and push this out to team members. If the of the shift changes we can have it updated within seconds.
cons: I would like to see the running cost of shifts change as and when I am making tweaks to my planner.

description: Really enjoyable, useful tool that benefits our business.
author: John G.
pros: Very easy to use and a system that connects a business with their workers seamlessly.
cons: No cons as of yet, been easy to use and a great addition.

description: Good experience overall however I would like presentations to be more detailed.
author: Kerwyn G.
pros: Ability to see preferred staff for events and how many events a staff has worked with a particular client.
cons: Not being able to see more information on the staff presentations.

description: great - very useful it has saved lots of admin in what used to be a very time consuming job.
author: Johnny C.
pros: its very simple for staff and emplyers to use
cons: I think if there was automated invoicing for staff that would well

description: Great. Staff love it. Simple to use. Team loves it.
author: Josh A.
pros: Very convenient to send job offers to staff
cons: Phone business app not as helpful. Wish it was better.
